{# !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ! SHARED FILE — tesseract-jax and tesseract-streamlit pull this ! ! template from tesseract-core/main at build time via HTTP. ! ! Do NOT rename or move this file. Keep changes compatible with all ! ! three repos (use the is_core flag for core-only paths). ! !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Override Furo's page template to add a persistent top navigation bar and support custom body classes from page metadata. In tesseract-core the internal links use pathto(); in other repos they fall back to absolute URLs on the live deployment. #} {% extends "!page.html" %} {# Base URL for tesseract-core docs (used when building other repos) #} {% set core_base = "https://docs.pasteurlabs.ai/projects/tesseract-core/latest/" %} {% set is_core = (project == "Tesseract Core") %} {% block body %}
Tesseract

{% set _page_class = meta.get("html_class", "") if meta else "" %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
